calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Prove-Up Hearing And For Entry Of Default Court Judgment Against Defendant Janeesah D. Holmes
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Janeesah D. Holmes.
Dept. 514. Judge: Charlene Padovani Kiesselbach. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kaipo K.B. Young, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Fire Credit Union.
Joseph Slezak, Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Young and Slezak appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Janeesh D. Holmes.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on March 6, 2020.
Substitute service on defendant Janeesh D. Holmes occurred on May 29, 2020, and was effectuated on June 19, 2020.
Default as to defendant Janeesh D. Holmes was entered on July 14, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 14, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff San Francisco Fire Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Janeesh D. Holmes, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,420.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,625.00.
Costs - $533.00.

Total - $32,578.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Prove-Up Hearing And For Entry Of Default Court Judgment Against Defendant Janeesah D. Holmes
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Continued To Dec-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
